desc: This Duplicant has knowledge from the before times.
The fuzzy snoots! The little claws! The chitinous exoskeletons! This Duplicant's never met a critter they didn't like.
This Duplicant has muscles on their muscles.
This Duplicant has good bedside manner and a healing touch.
This Duplicant's so charming, chatting with them is sometimes enough to trigger an Overjoyed response.
This Duplicant could have been a talented opera singer in another life.
This Duplicant kicks into hyperdrive when the stress is on.
This Duplicant always wakes up feeling fresh and efficient!
This Duplicant's immune system bounces back faster than most.
This Duplicant is too cool to be bothered by the cold.
This Duplicant is positively glowing.
This Duplicant's refined palate demands only the most luxurious dishes the colony can offer.
This Duplicant likes to throw a wrench into the colony's plans... in a good way.
This Duplicant regards every plant as a potential friend.
This Duplicant is a swift and skilled builder.
This Duplicant's radiant self-confidence makes even the rattiest outfits look trendy.
"Move it a little to the left..."
This Duplicant can eat just about anything without getting sick.
This Duplicant prefers solitary pursuits.
They're great for tunneling, but finding good gloves is a nightmare.
This Duplicant does their best work when they'd ought to be sleeping.
This Duplicant's sharp as a tack and learns new skills with amazing speed.
This Duplicant eats radiation for breakfast (and dinner).
Meteor showers get this Duplicant really, really hyped.
This Duplicant could lick a Puft's backside and taste nothing.
This Duplicant loves being in space.
This Duplicant is light as a feather on their feet.
This Duplicant has simply no appreciation for the arts.
This Duplicant begins with a pre-learned Skill, but does not have increased Morale Requirements.
This Duplicant begins with a pre-learned Skill, but does not have increased Morale Requirements.
This Duplicant begins with a pre-learned Skill, but does not have increased Morale Requirements.

This Duplicant begins with a pre-learned Skill, but does not have increased Morale Requirements.
This Duplicant will sneeze uncontrollably when exposed to the pollen present in Floral Scent.
This Duplicant has trouble keeping up with the others.
All the vitamin C in space couldn't stop this Duplicant from getting sick.
This Duplicant might actually be several black holes in a trench coat.
This Duplicant has trouble constructing anything besides meaningful friendships.
This Duplicant just doesn't trust those beadly little eyes.
Some Duplicants are just full of it.
This Duplicant has a deep-seated distrust of the culinary arts
This Duplicant needs a little extra time to "do their business".
This Duplicant could probably figure out a way to burn ice cream.
In space, everyone can hear you snore.
This Duplicant always invites friends over just to make them hook up their electronics.
This Duplicant sucks up way more than their fair share of Oxygen.
This Duplicant can fall asleep anytime, anyplace.
This Duplicant's arms have all the tensile strength of overcooked linguine.
This Duplicant will imagine scary shapes in the dark all night if no one leaves a light on.
This Duplicant abhors violence.
Never ask this Duplicant to watch your ferns when you go on vacation.
This Duplicant's clearly never heard of ironing.
This Duplicant's a little slow on the uptake, but gosh do they try.
This Duplicant has a tiny, pea-sized Bladder. Adorable!
This Duplicant is of delicate disposition and cannot tend to the sick.
This Duplicant's fear of holes makes it impossible for them to dig.
This Duplicant is incapable of building even the most basic of structures.
This Duplicant couldn't dig themselves out of a paper bag.
This Duplicant's lack of bedside manner makes it difficult for them to nurse peers back to health.
This Duplicant proudly proclaims they "can't even draw a stick figure".
This Duplicant isn't the brightest star in the solar system.
